title: arachnorchis excelsa
intro: Arachnorchis excelsa, also known as the 'King Orchid', is a rare and endangered terrestrial orchid native to Western Australia. Traditionally, the plant has been used by indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Arachnorchis excelsa are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tincture or infused in water to be used as a treatment for various ailments.
